description: An Incident Response (IR) scanner has flagged several raw data blocks on a suspect's USB drive as containing fragments of a malicious payload. Trace the physical blocks listed in /home/ga/evidence/flagged_blocks.txt back to logical files within the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Generate a pipe-delimited report at /home/ga/Reports/block_tracing_report.csv with the header BLOCK_ID|BLOCK_ALLOCATED|INODE|FILE_PATH. For each block, record its allocation status (ALLOCATED or UNALLOCATED), its associated Inode/MFT Record, and its full logical file path. If a block does not map to an inode, record NONE for both INODE and FILE_PATH. If an inode is found but the file path cannot be resolved, record the INODE and NONE for the FILE_PATH.
